core_philosophy: Objective, Truthful, Authoritative, Minimalist. The design acts as a transparent vessel for complex geopolitical data. High-contrast typography and strict grid systems evoke premium editorial standards.

headings.usage: Use for all major section headers, breaking news titles, and dashboard widget titles.

body.usage: Use for all article content, UI labels, and standard text.

monospace.usage: Use for timestamps, data metrics, status tags, and language switchers.

multi_language.persian_support: Persian (FA) requires Right-to-Left (RTL) layout. Use standard logical CSS properties in Tailwind (e.g., ms-4 instead of ml-4, pe-4 instead of pr-4), or ensure the UI flips correctly when dir='rtl' is applied to the HTML tag. Select a compatible Persian web font (e.g., Vazirmatn) as fallback for FA text.

usage_rules.backgrounds: 95% of the UI should be stark white or tinted grey. No full-screen gradients. Color is used ONLY for function (e.g., Red for breaking news or Live status, Blue for links/primary actions).
usage_rules.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white).
usage_rules.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use visible 1px borders (border-zinc-200) for grid structures and cards.

spacing_and_layout.general: Follow generous spacing for public-facing articles (p-8 to p-12). For the admin dashboard, use tight density (p-4).

grids.public_news_landing: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetrical layouts for articles. The hero article spans 8 columns, side stories span 4.
grids.admin_dashboard: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict 3 or 4 column grid for AI content generation queues, RSS feeds, and stats.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first. Ensure all containers have padding. Left-align dense text and article bodies for readability. RTL languages must naturally right-align.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), NO shadow by default. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
cards.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-sm. Border color darkens to zinc-400.

buttons.primary: bg-red-700 text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold hover:bg-red-800 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-900 text-zinc-900 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white transition-colors

navigation.style: Glassmorphism for sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-zinc-200). Must include language switcher (FR/EN/FA).

status_indicators.live: Include a pulsing red dot (animate-pulse bg-red-600) for real-time monitoring feeds.

components.shadcn_customization: Override default Shadcn radii to 0px (rounded-none) to fit the brutalist/Swiss editorial aesthetic. Remove soft box-shadows.

motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Use fast, crisp transitions (e.g., transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for news feeds and article lists.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a slow-moving editorial ribbon for breaking news or trending topics (e.g., react-fast-marquee with serif text and wide gaps).

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='lang-switch-fa', data-testid='publish-draft-btn').

hero_background.description: Panoramic view of Tehran skyline at dusk. Use with heavy gradient overlay (bg-black/50) for the main landing page header if full-width is used.

news_placeholder.description: Milad tower in Tehran. Use as a placeholder for news articles lacking an image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a strict Swiss Grid aesthetic. The UI must feel like a premium printed newspaper adapted for a high-tech monitoring dashboard.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Ensure RTL (Right-to-Left) layout support is properly architected for the Persian (FA) translation.
The admin workflow (AI drafting, review, publish) must use dense, highly organized table/list layouts (Control Room Grid).
The public-facing news feed must use asymmetrical bento grids (Tetris Grid) to differentiate article importance.
Override default Shadcn styles: use 0px border radius (rounded-none) and remove soft drop-shadows to maintain the brutalist editorial look.
Do not use placeholder image services; use the provided 'image_urls'.
